component.name: Open Authenticator
component.summary: A cross-platform OTP app, free and open-source

description.p: Protect your online accounts with Open Authenticator

Open Authenticator generates Time-Based One-Time Passwords (TOTPs), which serve as the second factor in the 2FA process. These temporary codes are valid for a short period of time and are used alongside your password to verify your identity when logging into your accounts. This significantly enhances the security of your online accounts and protects them from unauthorized access.

Open-Source & Free to use : Our commitment to transparency and security means our app is open-source and will always remain free for local use. If it doesn't cost anything for us, then it shouldn't cost anything for you !
Cross-Platform Compatibility : Seamlessly use your TOTP tokens on all your devices, whether you're using Linux, Android, iOS, macOS or Windows.
A lovely crafted app : Open Authenticator has been designed to be fast and easy to use. Quickly find all your TOTPs and copy them directly from the main page !
Here are the reasons why you should download Open Authenticator :
Enhanced Security : Protect your online accounts from unauthorized access with strong 2FA.
User-Friendly Interface : Intuitive design makes it easy to add, manage, and organize your TOTP tokens.
Continuous Improvement : We're dedicated to delivering the best user experience and regularly update our app with new features and improvements.

ul.li: Download Open Authenticator for other platforms : https://openauthenticator.app/#download
Now using `Auth Tabs` on Android and `ASWebAuthenticationSession` on Darwin to handle authentication links.
Fixed an `AccessDenied` error occurring in snap.
Networks requests will not automatically fail if there is an error in `ConnectivityStateNotifier`.
Added `network-status` and silenced various network warnings.
Fixed an `AccessDenied` error occurring in snap.
Improved the master password unlock method.
Now supporting localization in redirect routes.
Added a `CryptoKey` that unifies both `Salt` and `DerivedKey`.
Added a `StoredSalt` to add a distinction between a `Salt` object and the stored `Salt` object.
`CryptoStore.createHmacKey()` is now `CryptoStore.hmacSecretKey`. Also dropped support of `memEquals` in favor of hashlib `isEqual`.
Instead of failing, the app now tries to get the salt back from TOTP list.
Fixed a bug with old backups restoring.
Fixed some app links being consumed more than once.
Fixed some user related errors being incorrectly sent to Sentry.
Backend URL change now displays more info.
Fixed some app links being consumed more than once.
Did a lot of various updates.
Improved TOTPs images cache and display.
Improved how push operations sorting was handled.
Now using timestamped tombstones to store deleted TOTPs.
Updated README, contribution guidelines and issue templates.
Updated dependencies, contribution guidelines and ignored files.
Updated the app to use a custom backend.
Moved the docs into their own repo.
Added an experimental way to build Flatpaks.
Now using `.gradle.kts` file format instead of `.gradle`.
